headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Alexandria Real Estate, Lowers Price Target to $53
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Ronald Kamdem   maintains Alexandria Real Estate (NYSE:ARE) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $54 to $53.
